entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A significant oilseed crop cultivated in over 100 countries worldwide, also known as peanut.

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A severe disease affecting groundnut that leads to significant yield losses.

entities.name: YIELD LOSSES
entities.description: Reduction in crop productivity, up to 50%, caused by Late leaf spot.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut varieties to withstand or tolerate Late leaf spot.

entities.name: GPBD 4
entities.description: A groundnut variety derived from Arachis cardenasii that serves as a global source of resistance against Late leaf spot.

entities.name: ARACHIS CARDENASII
entities.description: A wild species of groundnut from which the resistant variety GPBD 4 was derived.

entities.name: A. KEMPFFMERCADOI
entities.description: A wild species used to develop introgression lines with high resistance to Late leaf spot.

entities.name: A. HOEHNEI
entities.description: A wild species used to develop introgression lines with high resistance to Late leaf spot.

entities.name: A. DURANENSIS
entities.description: A wild species used to develop introgression lines with high resistance to Late leaf spot.

entities.name: A. BATIZOCOI
entities.description: A wild species used to develop introgression lines with high resistance to Late leaf spot.

entities.name: A. IPAENSIS
entities.description: A wild species used to develop introgression lines with high resistance to Late leaf spot.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINES
entities.description: Lines developed from synthetic crosses with wild species to transfer resistance traits into groundnut.

entities.name: SNP-BASED ALLELE MINING
entities.description: A technique used to identify specific alleles associated with Late leaf spot resistance in introgression lines.

entities.name: CHR13_142435734
entities.description: A marker from GPBD 4 associated with Late leaf spot resistance.

entities.name: CHR13_144038674
entities.description: A marker from GPBD 4 associated with Late leaf spot resistance.

entities.name: CHR13_143296024
entities.description: A marker from GPBD 4 associated with Late leaf spot resistance.

entities.name: RECEPTOR LIKE PROTEIN 29
entities.description: A protein encoded by markers associated with Late leaf spot resistance.

entities.name: PENTATRICOPEPTIDE REPEAT-CONTAINING PROTEIN
entities.description: A protein encoded by markers associated with Late leaf spot resistance.

entities.name: BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop introgression lines by crossing hybrids with a recurrent parent.

entities.name: ICGV91114
entities.description: A parent line used in the backcrossing process to develop introgression lines.

entities.name: ISATGR 121250
entities.description: A parent line used in the backcrossing process to develop introgression lines.

entities.name: ICGV87846
entities.description: A parent line used in the backcrossing process to develop introgression lines.

entities.name: ISATGR 265-5A
entities.description: A parent line used in the backcrossing process to develop introgression lines.

entities.name: ISATGR-278-18
entities.description: A parent line used in the backcrossing process to develop introgression lines.

entities.name: TMV2
entities.description: A parent line used in the backcrossing process to develop introgression lines.

entities.name: RAINY 2024
entities.description: The environmental period during which the best-performing introgression lines were selected.

entities.name: RAINY 2025
entities.description: The environmental period planned for the phenotype confirmation of resistance traits.
